name: Shrimp with Lobster Sauce.i.e.s.jjgf65a
recipeIngredient: 2 tablespoons fermented black beans (soaked in water for 10 minutes and crushed)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a wok, brown the pork until it separates into small pieces.
2. Add the fermented black beans (previously soaked in water for 10 minutes and crushed), along with 1 clove of chopped garlic and 1 teaspoon of chopped ginger. Stir fry for about 1 minute.
3. Add the shrimp and cook until pink.
4. Add the oyster sauce and mix.
5. Then add the chicken stock. After the sauce comes to a boil, add some tapioca starch or cornstarch mixed with a little water to thicken it.
6. Add the beaten egg to the sauce and mix quickly.
7. Garnish with scallions and a few drops of sesame oil.
